genre_refs: "How it started / How it's going" meme format
description: Side-by-side split-panel graphic in the 'How it started / How it's going' format. Both halves use a darkened aerial photo of a shipping-container port/terminal as background. The left panel is tinted blue and headed 'HOW IT STARTED:' in bold white all-caps serif; it contains a white rounded card with a 'FOX BUSINESS' logo and the headline 'Manufacturing sector sheds 78K jobs in last three months' dated 'November 4, 2024'. The right panel is tinted gray and headed 'HOW IT'S GOING:' with a white card bearing the 'FOX BUSINESS' logo and the headline 'Foreign and domestic investments totaling over $5T under Trump, adds 451k jobs for Americans' dated 'April 22, 2025.'
notable_text: HOW IT STARTED: Manufacturing sector sheds 78K jobs in last three months - November 4, 2024; HOW IT'S GOING: Foreign and domestic investments totaling over $5T under Trump, adds 451k jobs for Americans - April 22, 2025
